programme.title: The Decline Of Western Civilization, Part II: The Metal Years
programme.desc: The second in Penelope Spheeris’ trilogy, The Metal Years takes a fast-paced look at the outrageous Heavy Metal scene of the late '80s. Set in Los Angeles, the film explores fascinating portraits of struggling musicians, fans and star-struck groupies. Featuring Alice Cooper, Ozzy Osbourne, Poison and members of Aerosmith, Kiss, and Motorhead as well as performances by Megadeath, Faster Pussycat, Lizzy Borden, London, Odin and Seduce, this raucous and entertaining chapter also chronicles the lonely naiveté of the striving bands, the endless flow of alcohol and drugs and the relentless sexism.

When a drifter discovers the profitable trade of hunting men for money, he quickly rises as a ruthless bounty killer. But as his reputation grows, so do the dangers—outlaws, rival hunters, and his own thirst for power push him toward a violent reckoning. With stark desert landscapes, brutal gunfights, and the grit of Italian Western style, this tale shows the high price of killing for gold.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep108: Manatees and Dugongs In Danger
programme.desc: Each year, hundreds of critically endangered manatees are killed in U.S. waters by boats, disease and cold weather. 2006 was the worst year on record for manatee deaths – 416 animals perished. With only a few thousand remaining in the wild, mostly in heavily developed Florida wetlands, the clock is ticking in efforts to save this amazing mammal from extinction.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep305: US Virgin Islands by Paddleboard
programme.desc: With sheltered turquoise waters, the U.S. Virgin Islands is an ideal location to explore by stand-up paddleboard. In this Facing Waves episode, we compete in USVI's Paddle-The-Park SUP race, we snorkel fish-filled waters, and find out why SUP yoga has become so popular.

programme.title: Blue World Ep402: Bull Sharks in Mexico + NASA's Neutral Buoyancy Lab
programme.desc: Blue World travels to Mexico for an up-close encounter with Bull sharks and then visits NASA's Neutral Buoyancy Lab in Houston where astronauts train underwater for space walking.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep103: Mysterious Tentacles
programme.desc: Mysterious Tentacles follows Dr. Jennifer Mather as she leads a team of renowned scientists to the beautiful Caribbean island of Bonaire. Their mission is to prove a controversial theory: reef squid speak to each other with a complex language they paint on their skin.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: Contestants Stephen and Zacharias sit down to go through their experience with shooting the latest nonlethal weaponry and how their mission prep is going so far. From there, host Chris Heavens invites U.S. Arms and Athlon Optics to take a seat and show a sneak peak at their latest products. Before the end of the episode, the contestants let it slip that there’s going to be quite the surprise to come.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The wrath of Mann is upon the contestants as Don doles out punishments to the entire squad for one person’s mistake. On the tails of the punishment, Don leads everyone in a lesson on BUD/S training. Later, co-host and retired Green Beret, Mike Glover, gives the contestants a life lesson on survival they won’t soon forget. To top off the episode, one of the contestants demonstrates his industry-changing hollow point bullets in some meaty targets.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: Chris and Cindy sit down with Jenn and Lanny to take a deep dive into last night’s mission. If it wasn’t difficult enough to do a full day of Surviving Mann training, an overnight mission with no breaks seems to be the cherry on top. After a refreshing 2 hours of sleep, the contestants were back at it with an Olympic-level PT session hosted by Lanny. From there, Jen fills us in on a secret new product in the next episode of Surviving Mann that reminds her of... Fembots? Stay tuned.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Surviving Mann returns with its most punishing season opener yet. In true Don Mann fashion, the bar is raised with a grueling 10-part physical readiness test—infused with a blast of hypothermia for good measure. Don himself calls it “the most brutal PT [he’s] ever witnessed,” and it’s clear the contestants are in for a world of hurt. To push them even further, MMA legend Ken Shamrock joins the fray, bringing his no-nonsense intensity to whip the group into fighting shape. Those who survive the trial by ice and exertion are rewarded with a chance to test-fire the lightest AR on the market—if they can still feel their trigger fingers.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: Kyle and Caleb give the skinny on the hamstring pull that was heard around the world. From there, Surviving Mann fans get a glimpse at just how far Faraday containers can go to protect your security, privacy and device. After, Black Aces does a deep dive into their available products and some exciting plans for the future.

programme.title: WPT L.A. Poker Classic 2020 - Part 3
programme.desc: Play is down to three-handed in Las Vegas for the WPT L.A. Poker Classic title and race to win $1 million. The largest televised prize of Season XVII on the World Poker Tour awaits Darren Elias, Matas Cimbolas, and David Baker as all bring their A-game in pursuit of one of poker’s most prestigious events.

programme.title: WPT L.A. Poker Classic 2020 - Part 4
programme.desc: The final battle for $1 million is here at HyperX Esports Arena for the WPT L.A. Poker Classic title. See if Darren Elias can win his fifth WPT or if David Baker has other ideas to win his first while Matas Cimbolas plays for a prestigious second win of his own.

programme.title: WPT Seminole Hardrock Poker Showdown 2020 - Part 1
programme.desc: An incredible lineup of poker is at HyperX Esports Arena as a field of 1,360 players is down to only six in Las Vegas. Maria Ho headlines looking for her first WPT title and the $715,000 first-place prize and a total prize pool of $4.35 million is on the line. Eric Afriat also plays for his second WPT Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown win and third overall WPT title.

programme.title: WPT Seminole Hardrock Poker Showdown 2020 - Part 2
programme.desc: Maria Ho is up against WPT Champions James Carroll and Eric Afriat in Las Vegas playing for the WPT Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown title. $715,000 awaits the winner and a seat to the exclusive WPT Baccarat Crystal Tournament of Champions, see if Maria can push forward to win her breakthrough title.

programme.title: WPT Seminole Hardrock Poker Showdown 2020 - Part 3
programme.desc: WPT Bay 101 Shooting Star champion James Carroll can win his second WPT title but faces tough competition against Maria Ho and fellow WPT Champions Club member Eric Afriat, who are looking to win $715,000 and a luxurious Hublot watch in one of the year’s biggest events.

programme.title: New Zealand
programme.desc: Join host Philippe Cousteau Jr., grandson of legendary explorer Jacques Cousteau, as he journeys to the most spectacular places on the planet. In this episode, Cousteau travels to New Zealand, where he explores Auckland's volcanic field and comes face-to-face with one of the largest insects on the planet. We then head to the South Island for a breathtaking helicopter ride and a visit to a small coastal town.

programme.title: Osaka
programme.desc: On this episode of Photowalks, join Jefferson Graham in Osaka, Japan to explore the many shopping arcades. The stores in Osaka are often clustered together to attract foot traffic. The many indoor shopping areas also make it easier to shop during the often-rainy weather.

programme.desc: Join host Philippe Cousteau Jr., grandson of legendary explorer Jacques Cousteau, as he journeys to the most spectacular places on the planet. programme.title: The Week As It Happened
programme.desc: Get caught up on all the big stories and breaking news from the week.

programme.title: Caught On Clips
programme.desc: The wildest, wackiest, and most jaw-dropping videos. From dangerous severe weather, to heart-stopping close calls and adorable animal antics - all caught on camera.

programme.title: New Zealand
programme.desc: Join host Philippe Cousteau Jr., grandson of legendary explorer Jacques Cousteau, as he journeys to the most spectacular places on the planet. In this episode, Cousteau travels to New Zealand, where he explores Auckland's volcanic field and comes face-to-face with one of the largest insects on the planet. We then head to the South Island for a breathtaking helicopter ride and a visit to a small coastal town.

programme.title: Osaka
programme.desc: On this episode of Photowalks, join Jefferson Graham in Osaka, Japan to explore the many shopping arcades. The stores in Osaka are often clustered together to attract foot traffic. The many indoor shopping areas also make it easier to shop during the often-rainy weather.

programme.title: St. Augustine
programme.desc: Explore the Spanish architecture of St. Augustine, Florida with Jefferson Graham of Photowalks. Learn tips for taking photographs in the beautiful sunshine.
